name: Feather Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 - 450°F.
2. Mix all ingredients in a bowl until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into muffin tins.
4. Bake for about 20-25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
5. Turn off the oven and let the muffins cool in the oven for another 10 minutes before removing them from the tins.
